title: stachys palustris var. baicalensis
intro: Stachys palustris var. baicalensis, also known as Baikal hedgenettle or Baikal bugloss, is a plant species within the genus Stachys and the family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Russia and Mongolia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stachys palustris var. baicalensis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared for consumption through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
